sections.paragraph:
verb לשאת

to carry; lift; bear, endure, suffer; marry; forgive

verb להינשא

be carried; be lifted; be suffered, endured; marry; be forgiven

verb להינשא

get married

verb להתנשא

be arrogant; be lofty, rise to a great height

adjective נשא (>>נישא)

high, lofty

noun

carrier
